name: Parabellum: Siege Of Legends
short_description: An epic war and strategy game set in the medieval universe.
detailed_description:
Parabellum, Siege of legends is an independent 2D scrolling adventure and construction game.

Play as a hero who must build a city, become the guardian of its riches and attack your enemies.

Develop a thriving economy.

Around your dungeon, build fields, mills and shops, always extend the borders of your city further to produce more resources. Carefully managing your finances will be crucial to avoiding starvation and bankruptcy.

Prepare your defenses carefully.

Enemies lurk in every corner of your kingdom, ready to take advantage of the slightest gap. Build imposing walls and watchtowers to protect your city from invasions. Plan your defenses strategically, anticipating attacks and adapting your fortifications to your opponents' tactics. Each defensive battle will be a test of your ability to keep your lands secure.

Build legendary armies.

Recruit and train a variety of troops, from elite infantry to razor-sharp archers. Every soldier can turn the tide of war. Train and upgrade your warriors to forge a military power capable of overthrowing entire kingdoms. With your hero, lead your troops into epic battles where every tactical move, formation and ambush can determine the outcome of the fight. Show your bravery and strategic sense to crush your enemies.

Features

  • Play as multiple heroes

  • Build buildings

  • Develop your economy and expand your city

  • Form a large army to defend your borders

  • Go through more than 10 varied missions

  • Attack your enemies

  • Contemplate unique sets and artistic direction.

  • Incredible soundtrack

History and narration

You will play several characters in a story where the quest for power and betrayal combine.

Three imposing nations coexist on the great continent.

In the Highlands, a very religious and powerful empire was built, thanks to its fertile lands of Champvert.

To the south, the Sultanate of Basse-Terre has established a brilliant civilization with its iron mines, in the heart of the desert.

Finally, in the north, the Ice Lands are populated by warriors who have always waged war against each other.

It is in these lands, which know only tears and blood, that a rumor carried by the winds claims that a woman will rise to become queen and unify all these clans...

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Danish, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish, Turkish, Traditional Chinese
